message:
Command `# It reads from a file "open_pdks_rev" in the librelane root!
# Find and read that file
find /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env -name "open_pdks_rev" 2>/dev/null | head -3
cat $(find /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env -name "open_pdks_rev" 2>/dev/null | head -1) 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
